answer:
<think> The Tower of Terror was once the fastest drop roller coaster in the world when it opened in 1994. However, it was surpassed by other roller coasters that opened with greater drop heights or faster speeds. One such roller coaster is Kingda Ka, which opened in 2005 with a world record 128 mph speed. </think>
<answer> 2005

This is the year when another roller coaster, Kingda Ka, surpassed the Tower of Terror's record as the fastest roller coaster in the world.
